description: Mermade provides tooling around OpenAPI and Swagger definitions. The mermade.org.uk service documented here converts Swagger 2.0 definitions to OpenAPI 3.0.x and validates OpenAPI documents.
summary: mermade.org.uk exposes one public HTTP API: the Swagger2OpenAPI Converter API at `https://mermade.org.uk/api/v1`, documented by an OpenAPI spec and requiring no authentication.
